title: auricula-ursi palinuri
intro: Auricula-ursi palinuri, also known as bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a low-growing evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America and Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat urinary tract infections due to its high concentration of arbutin, a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of auricula-ursi palinuri include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of cystitis, prevent kidney stones, and even support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often dried and made into tea or capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its potential health benefits.
